content: cto architecture review complete: item 1 (.clinerules) flagged as a toolchain/scope mismatch against this repo's documented Claude Code + Codex CLI scope and its existing .pmcro/trails persistence layer -- written up as proposal-1-clinerules.md with a not-recommended-as-specified verdict and an alternative. Items 2 and 3 assessed as clean fits.

clo boundary review complete: no C-Suite Law 4 violation for any of the 3 items (Colony-wide governance docs, same category ceo has edited directly before). Persistence-duplication concern for item 1 noted as a distinct, non-domain boundary issue.

Drafted full CLAUDE.md content (proposal-2-claude-md.md) -- twin to AGENTS.md for Claude Code, routing table sourced from catalog/skills.json and marketplace.json rather than hand-duplicated command lists, includes the Startup Protocol section.

Drafted Startup Protocol diff for AGENTS.md (proposal-3-startup-protocol.md), pointed at the Codex-native marketplace twin specifically rather than verbatim-copying the Claude-native path, to avoid the protocol itself becoming stale.
Nothing written to any live root file. git status confirms the only change on disk is this trail's own directory.
